name: Type 99A Main Battle Tank
description: China's most advanced main battle tank with a 125mm smoothbore gun, composite armor with ERA, and laser-warning/active protection systems. The backbone of PLA armored divisions.

specialAbilities.name: Laser Countermeasure System
specialAbilities.description: JD-3 laser dazzler blinds enemy optics and laser-guided munitions, disrupting targeting systems.

specialAbilities.name: Autoloader
specialAbilities.description: Automatic loading system sustains high rate of fire with reduced crew requirement.
